data.title: Securian Canada launches Creditor Insurance Digital Claims Portal for easy claim submission and tracking.(Numbers: multiple types of claims, collaboration with a leading Tier 1 Canadian bank, personalized bilingual portal)
data.description: Securian Canada has unveiled the Creditor Insurance Digital Claims Portal, a new online platform designed to streamline the process of submitting, managing, and tracking creditor insurance claims for customers. This initiative, developed in partnership with a top Tier 1 Canadian bank, offers a personalized bilingual portal for customers to submit critical illness, disability, and job loss claims digitally. Users also have the flexibility to opt for traditional paper claim submissions. This portal aims to enhance efficiency and speed up the claims process.
Company plans to offer more ordinary shares to public investors.

data.title: ADP jobs report reflects weak hiring, jobless claims increase, boosting Fed rate-cut expectations.
data.description: The latest ADP jobs report and initial jobless claims numbers contribute to a series of weak labor market signals, sparking optimism for a rapid response from the Federal Reserve in terms of interest rate reductions. The post-ADP jobs report reveals sluggish hiring trends, while there has been an increase in jobless claims, further supporting expectations for Fed rate cuts.

data.title: Trump plans tariffs over 25% on Japan, S. Korea & 5 nations causing S&P 500 to slide.
data.description: Tariffs of 25% or higher have been imposed by President Trump on Japan, South Korea, and five other countries. This action has caused the S&P 500 to decline.

data.title: International Society of Hair Restoration Surgery hosts 33rd World Congress in Berlin, Germany from October 23-25, with sold-out live surgery workshop on October 26, aiming to unveil innovative therapies for hair loss.
data.description: "Unity" is a groundbreaking event set to take place in Chicago on September 24, 2025, bringing together leading specialists in hair restoration from around the globe. This initiative aims to foster collaboration and knowledge exchange among experts in the field. Attendees can expect the introduction of cutting-edge surgical and non-surgical treatments designed to address various types of hair loss. The event is organized by the International Society of Hair Restoration Surgery and promises to showcase the latest advancements in the industry.

data.title: Buy.Video launches tool for direct sales of video content, providing revenue without ads or subscriptions. Based in Louisville, KY, founded on Sept. 24, 2025.
data.description: A new platform, Buy.Video, has been launched in Louisville, Ky., on Sept. 24, 2025, offering creatives and professionals a straightforward method to earn revenue from their videos. The platform eliminates the need for ads, algorithms, or subscriptions. Buy.Video has recently come out of stealth mode after securing funding for its public launch.

data.title: UNI price at $8.13 tests lower support with bearish signals as momentum fades, approaching critical levels.
data.description: Uniswap's token UNI is currently trading at $8.13, showing bearish technical signals as it nears critical support levels. The token is experiencing declining momentum indicators.

data.title: Hoth Therapeutics expands HT-001 development to target drug-induced hypersensitivity, radiotherapy-induced rash, and MENIN inhibitor-associated skin toxicities.aiming to help patients manage severe dermatological side effects from MENIN inhibitors.
data.description: A new class of targeted oncology drugs known as MENIN inhibitors are showing promise in treating acute leukemias and specific solid tumors. However, their effectiveness is hindered by severe dermatological side effects. HT-001 is being developed to combat these toxicities, enabling patients to stay on treatment and potentially achieve improved outcomes. This development offers hope for individuals affected by these cancers, with significant potential impact on leukemia and solid tumor treatment.

data.title: Bandwidth supports OpenAI's Realtime API for AI voice agents, enhancing edge infrastructure; beneficial for enterprises.
data.description: In a recent development, Bandwidth has seamlessly integrated OpenAI's GPT language models with its Communications Cloud. This integration offers enterprises various pathways to incorporate their desired conversational AI voice agents into Bandwidth's AI-ready edge infrastructure. This collaboration aims to enhance communication capabilities by leveraging advanced language models. The announcement was made in Raleigh, North Carolina, on September 24, 2025.

data.title: Trump plans Supreme Court appeal for tariffs after federal court deems many tariffs illegal.
data.description: The President announced plans to request fast-track assessment of a federal appeals court decision declaring numerous tariffs implemented by his administration as unlawful.

data.title: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacifico issued Ps. 8.5 billion worth of bond certificates in Mexico.
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, on August 22, 2025, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE:PAC; BMV: GAP) declared the successful completion of issuing 85 million long-term bond certificates in Mexico (Certificados Bursátiles) totaling Ps. 8.5 billion (8.5 billion pesos).

data.title: Trump family makes profits despite lackluster launch of crypto tokens; deal could mean hundreds of millions in revenue.
data.description: The cryptocurrency token issued by World Liberty Financial did not meet investors’ expectations, resulting in a significant decline. However, a prior agreement set the stage for a substantial payment to be made to the Trump family, potentially amounting to hundreds of millions of dollars.

data.title: Derek Bryson Park's unique financial and diplomatic leadership journey highlighted - from Vatican diplomat to Wall Street innovator.
data.description: Follow the remarkable journey of Derek Bryson Park, who transitioned from a Vatican diplomat to a prominent figure in Wall Street, showcasing global impact. Unveiling a unique narrative of transformation, Park's shift from diplomacy to finance displayed a profound influence on a global scale. In this untold story, Park's transition is highlighted - where he leveraged his background to navigate the complexities of the financial world. Witnessing a significant rise, Park's influence spanned continents, resonating with key players across the globe. His journey serves as a testament to the fluidity of career paths, with Park's story embodying the essence of adaptability and innovation as he became a prominent figure in the financial realm.

data.title: Appeals court nullifies Trump's tariffs, leaving duties intact for potential Supreme Court appeal. Big setback for trade policies.
data.description: The ruling against President Trump's trade policies is a significant setback, with the judges opting to maintain the tariffs for the time being to facilitate a potential appeal to the Supreme Court.

data.title: Potential scenario: Trump's move to dismiss Lisa Cook reveals Fed's autonomy decline, risking economic impact for US citizens.
data.description: An effort by President Trump to dismiss Lisa Cook has exposed a decline in the Federal Reserve's autonomy. This situation could have economic repercussions for the American people, as outlined by The New York Times's top economics reporter.

data.title: IperionX receives tax-exempt bond issuance capacity worth up to $150M.
data.description: A record number of 1,500 new COVID-19 cases were reported today, bringing the total number of cases in the country to 25,000. Additionally, the death toll has risen to 350, with 50 new deaths reported in the past 24 hours. The government has announced new restrictions in an effort to curb the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and the closure of non-essential businesses. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to these measures to prevent further spikes in cases.

data.title: Trump's policies shook the 'Queen of Heels,' leading to 25% tariffs and rocky manufacturing abroad for entrepreneurs.
data.description: The recent implementation of high tariffs and unpredictable decisions by the president has made operating in foreign markets risky for businesses, including those established in countries considered as secure alternatives to China.

data.title: Payden Securitized Income Fund (PYSFX) provides diversified securitized credit exposure for income investors.
data.description: The Payden Securitized Income Fund, with the ticker symbol PYSFX, presents a varied opportunity for income investors looking to diversify their exposure to securitized credit.
Refresco finalizes purchase of Telemark Kildevann, acquisition deal worth $100 million.

data.title: HireArt survey challenges gig economy assumptions, finds contractors value stability and development over flexibility.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by HireArt in 2025 has questioned the common beliefs around the gig economy and is urging employers to reconsider their approach to contingent talent. The workforce management platform based in New York is prompting a shift in strategy to better accommodate this flexible workforce. The survey’s findings indicate a significant shift in the way companies should engage with contingent workers, emphasizing the need for a more thoughtful and inclusive process. This call to action is based on the changing landscape, making it essential for companies to adapt to the new paradigm. With key insights and data gathered from the survey, HireArt is making a compelling case for businesses to reevaluate and optimize their utilization of contingent talent. This move towards a more strategic and tailored approach could lead to enhanced workforce management and efficiency in the years to come.
